requirement: Deterministic Execution — same intent → same plan
design_element: IDAGSynthesizer with deterministic dependency resolution; deterministic_synthesis_guard() in state machine

requirement: Interface Authority — Planner consumes F1, D8, D9, F4 via defined protocols only
design_element: All 4 G1 protocols defined as typing.Protocol; integration blueprint maps every call to existing subsystem API

requirement: State Management — Planning state machine with guards
design_element: 12-state planning SM with 7 guards (validate_intent, deterministic_synthesis, critic_eval, plan_immutable, adaptation, escape, retry)

requirement: Deterministic Ordering — priority assignment is deterministic
design_element: IDAGSynthesizer.assign_priorities() uses deterministic sort keys; priority tied to critical path position

requirement: Observability Mandatory — planning events must be observable
design_element: Hook points for PlanningDriftDetected, CriticRejection, SwarmDeadlock, AdaptationThrottled, DeterminismViolation all publish to runtime.planning.alert

requirement: Deterministic Recovery — replanning follows same path for same inputs
design_element: Deterministic Replay Guard (§4) with context hashing, weight pinning, topology cache, seed locking

requirement: Deterministic Scheduling — planner respects existing scheduling guarantees
design_element: Published plans are immutable (RULE 2); plan_immutable_guard() blocks re-publication

requirement: Fairness — critic feedback is available to all plans equally
design_element: ICriticFeedbackLoop.evaluate_plan_quality() rates every plan; adaptation requires ≥ 2 critic signals OR confidence ≥ 0.8

requirement: Service Ownership — each swarm agent owns exactly one domain
design_element: ISwarmCoordinator.distribute_tasks() assigns by capability set; SwarmIntent.capability_set is owned by exactly one agent

requirement: Routing — swarm routing through D8 Service Mesh
design_element: IDAGSynthesizer.map_to_tools() queries D8 ServiceRegistry; tasks routed via D8 mesh envelope

requirement: Retry Semantics — retry_guard limits retries
design_element: retry_guard() allows max 3 re-synthesis attempts; CRITIC_REJECTED → DAG_SYNTHESIS retry path capped at 3

requirement: Persistence — plan state persisted for replay
design_element: ExecutionPlan carries version, adapted_from, created_at_ns; F4 Observability stores plan_trace_id for replay

requirement: No Shared State — swarm agents communicate via negotiation protocol only
design_element: ISwarmCoordinator.negotiate_capabilities() uses SwarmNegotiation dataclass; no shared dicts between agents

requirement: Determinism — same intent+context → same DAG topology every time
design_element: IDAGSynthesizer with topology cache keyed by (intent, context_hash, weight_hash); deterministic_synthesis_guard() enforces cache hit

requirement: Reversibility — published plans are immutable
design_element: plan_immutable_guard() blocks any transition out of PUBLISHED; adaptation creates new version (does not mutate)

requirement: Recoverability — guarded adaptation with critic signal
design_element: adaptation_guards() requires ≥ 2 critic signals OR confidence ≥ 0.8; max 5 adaptations per plan_trace_id; 60s cooldown

requirement: Terminal states — plan terminal states defined
design_element: PlanStatus enum includes terminal states: COMPLETED, FAILED, HALTED, ESCALATED; no transitions from terminal states in SM

requirement: Idempotency — same plan_id → same validation result
design_element: validate_plan(plan_id) returns same result for same plan; publish_plan(plan_id) returns existing execution_id

requirement: F1 Unified API — planner publishes plans via F1
design_element: IPlannerAgent.publish_plan() calls F1.submit(); F1 returns execution_id mapped to plan_trace_id

requirement: D9 Feedback Loop — planner adapts based on runtime feedback
design_element: IPlannerAgent.adapt_plan() subscribes to EventBus runtime.planning.adapt from D9; guarded by adaptation_guards()

requirement: F4 Observability — planner consumes telemetry for critic evaluation
design_element: ICriticFeedbackLoop.evaluate_plan_quality() consumes F4 AggregationSummary; plan_trace_id propagates through F4 spans

requirement: CompositionRoot — all G1 components wired via CompositionRoot
design_element: Planner Agent receives F1, D8, D9, F4 as constructor dependencies; no direct instantiation outside CompositionRoot
